# xkcd-mcp

> FastMCP 3.1 server: xkcd comic metadata via **xkcd.com** official `info.0.json` only (no HTML scraping). Dual transport: **stdio** default, **HTTP** with MCP at `/mcp`. Optional Vite dashboard on **10779** proxied to the API on **10778**.

**Full detail:** see [`llms-full.txt`](llms-full.txt).

## Quick links

- [README](README.md) — install, run, tool table
- [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md)
- [glama.json](glama.json) — Glama discovery

## Tools (Discrete Surface v0.2.0)

- **`xkcd_latest`** — Fetch current comic.
- **`xkcd_get`** — Fetch specific comic index.
- **`xkcd_random`** — Surprise random comic.
- **`xkcd_help`** — Rich help card & port info.

## Ports (fleet range 10700–10800)

| Role | Port |
|------|------|
| FastAPI + MCP HTTP | **10778** |
| Vite dev (SPA) | **10779** |

Adjacency: backend/frontend paired per fleet **WEBAPP_STANDARDS** (see local `mcp-central-docs` clone if present).
